title: 3D Doors & Trapdoors
description: Enhances Doors and Trapdoors and make them 3D
body:
# 3D Doors & Trapdoors
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acf3514f4de3b3ce7b33f1f529e50684ee0e13cc.png)
###  Features

- Enhances Minecraft Doors and Trapdoors and make them 3D
- Gives you a more realistic experience of playing Minecraft
